title: CRM Platform Architecture
subtitle: Enterprise-grade CRM from scratch for a logistics company
problem: The client was using 4 disconnected tools — Excel, Telegram, a custom PHP legacy system, and Google Sheets — resulting in data loss, missed deals, and 3+ hours of manual work daily.
solution: Designed and built a unified CRM with deal pipelines, client cards, task automation, and a real-time notification system. Integrated with existing Telegram bot flow and internal API.
architecture: Modular monolith on the backend with clear domain separation (deals, clients, users, notifications). REST API + WebSockets for real-time updates. Frontend on Next.js App Router with server components for heavy data views.
result: Reduced manual data entry by 80%. Deal close rate improved 23% due to pipeline visibility. Team onboarded in 2 days with no training — the UX was that intuitive.

title: AI Content Pipeline
subtitle: Automated content generation and distribution system
problem: A media startup needed to produce 50+ localized articles per week across 3 languages. Manual writing was costing $8,000/month and taking 2 weeks per cycle.
solution: Built an AI-powered pipeline: topic clustering → LLM drafting (GPT-4) → human-in-loop editing interface → one-click multi-channel publishing to CMS, Telegram, and LinkedIn API.
architecture: Queue-based processing with Bull + Redis. Each article goes through stages: draft → review → publish. Admin dashboard shows pipeline state in real-time. LLM prompts are versioned in DB for A/B testing.
result: Content production cost dropped from $8K to $1.2K/month. Output increased 3x. Time-to-publish went from 14 days to 48 hours.

title: Frontend Performance Overhaul
subtitle: From 34 to 96 Lighthouse score on a high-traffic e-commerce site
problem: An e-commerce client had a Next.js site with Lighthouse score of 34. Pages took 8+ seconds to load on mobile. Bounce rate was 71%. Google Ads ROAS was tanking due to poor Core Web Vitals.
solution: Full audit and rebuild of rendering strategy. Moved from CSR to SSR/ISR hybrid. Implemented image optimization pipeline, critical CSS extraction, font subsetting, and aggressive caching headers.
architecture: ISR for product pages (revalidate: 60s), SSR for cart/auth, static for marketing pages. CDN-level caching with stale-while-revalidate. Custom image optimization loader. Bundle analyzer integrated in CI.
result: Lighthouse: 34 → 96. LCP: 8.2s → 1.4s. Bounce rate: 71% → 38%. Google Ads ROAS improved 2.4x within 30 days of launch.
